title: Undertake direct seeding
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake direct seeding demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare resources for direct seeding

pcs.text: Interpret and clarify requirements for seeding from site revegetation plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and clarify requirements for seeding from site revegetation plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and clarify requirements for seeding from site revegetation plan.

pcs.text: Select equipment and materials according to revegetation plan and site conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select equipment and materials according to revegetation plan and site conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select equipment and materials according to revegetation plan and site conditions.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Check equipment operation and conduct pre-start checks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check equipment operation and conduct pre-start checks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment operation and conduct pre-start checks.

pcs.text: Identify site environmental and heritage issues, and implement control measures according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site environmental and heritage issues, and implement control measures according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site environmental and heritage issues, and implement control measures according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Prepare seed for direct seeding

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check seed species and quality against required specifications in revegetation plan, and report inconsistencies to supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare seed to promote and improve germination according to revegetation plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare seed to promote and improve germination according to revegetation plan.

pcs.text: Prepare revegetation site to receive seed

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare revegetation site to receive seed.

elements.title: Conduct direct seeding operations

pcs.text: Conduct seeding operations according to workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct seeding activities according to the season and growing conditions specified in the revegetation plan.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
